where.if: AND ( CAST(target_user_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(client_uid, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(order_no, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(summary, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(operator_name, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(detail_json, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT id AS id, scope_type AS scopeType, action_type AS actionType, operator_type AS operatorType, operator_name AS operatorName, target_user_id AS targetUserId, COALESCE(client_uid, '') AS clientUid, COALESCE(order_no, '') AS orderNo, COALESCE(summary, '') AS summary, COALESCE(detail_json, '') AS detailJson, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM app_entitlement_audit_log
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
